title: Pfizer Seagen ADC Fails in Late-Stage Lung Cancer Trial
headline: Pfizer's antibody-drug conjugate acquired in the $43B Seagen deal disappoints in a late-stage lung cancer study, further souring the massive 2023 acquisition.
key_facts: Pfizer acquired Seagen for $43 billion in 2023; unnamed ADC failed in late-stage (Phase 3) lung cancer trial; multiple prior disappointments; article URL returned 404

title: CMS Settles Opzelura/Jakafi Classification Lawsuit with Incyte
headline: CMS agrees not to classify Opzelura together with Jakafi, resolving Incyte's lawsuit against the agency.
key_facts: Incyte dropped lawsuit against CMS; CMS agreed not to bundle Opzelura and Jakafi; June 23, 1:32pm publication; separation matters for Medicare Part D rebate calculations

title: Eli Lilly Follows Through on 340B Ultimatum
headline: Eli Lilly stops paying 340B discounts to non-compliant hospitals, drawing industry outrage and calls for HRSA intervention.
key_facts: Lilly followed through on previously announced 340B paperwork requirements; discounts stopped late last week (June 19-20); hospitals urging HRSA intervention; part of industry trend of manufacturers restricting 340B access

title: FDA Reverses Another Makary-Era Rejection
headline: FDA reverses another Makary-era drug rejection, allowing Regenxbio to resubmit its gene therapy application.
key_facts: FDA clearing backlog of rejections from Makary era; rejections contradicted earlier agreements with drugmakers; part of pattern of regulatory reversals; UniQure also filing gene therapy

title: Sangamo Therapeutics Shutting Down After 30 Years
headline: Sangamo Therapeutics, a pioneer in zinc-finger nuclease gene editing, is shutting down after roughly 30 years in operation.
key_facts: 30-year run coming to close; Eli Lilly and Astellas Pharma eyeing its assets; zinc-finger nuclease gene editing platform pioneer; no asset sale price disclosed

title: Genentech and Novartis Accused of Xolair Kickback Scheme
headline: Lawsuit alleges Genentech and Novartis engaged in a kickback scheme related to Xolair omalizumab.
key_facts: Lawsuit alleges kickback scheme; June 23, 8:25am publication; Xolair is blockbuster allergy/asthma biologic; carries potential for significant financial penalties under False Claims Act

title: Sanofi's R&D Leader Houman Ashrafian Departing
headline: Sanofi's R&D leader Houman Ashrafian is leaving to pursue a new opportunity.
key_facts: Houman Ashrafian departing as R&D leader at Sanofi; major leadership change at top-5 pharma R&D organization; previously at IQVIA and academia

title: Healthcare Sector Outperforms on Market Weakness
headline: Healthcare sector posts +1.31% return vs. S&P 500 decline of -1.44%, with defensive rotation into large-cap pharma.
key_facts: Healthcare sector +1.31% vs. S&P 500 -1.44%; Drug Manufacturers +1.53%; Biotech +1.18%; JNJ +3.37%, MRK +3.57%, ABBV +2.07%, LLY +0.45%, ABT +3.07%; $7.472T market cap
